description: Synthetic, technically consistent baseline for a distributed systems midterm report. This package is not measured data.

framework_semantics.expected_distribution: near-uniform round robin across the 12 active backends
framework_semantics.adaptivity: does not adapt away from degraded sp26-cs525-0605 during the fault window
framework_semantics.relative_fault_behavior: stronger fault-window impact than tri_cb or p2c_pewma
